title: VOA Daily English
description: Clear news-style English for daily shadowing.

sentences.english: Many learners improve their speaking by listening carefully and repeating short sentences.
sentences.chinese: 许多学习者通过认真聆听并重复短句来提高口语。

sentences.english: A steady routine can make pronunciation practice feel natural and less stressful.
sentences.chinese: 稳定的练习习惯能让发音训练变得自然，也减少压力。

sentences.english: The goal is not to speak fast, but to speak with rhythm, clarity, and confidence.
sentences.chinese: 目标不是说得快，而是说得有节奏、清晰且自信。
